heading: About
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer who enjoys taking a project from a rough idea to a live product — architecture, UI, performance, deployment, all of it. I care about the parts most people skip: the loading state, the error message, the animation that makes an interaction feel intentional instead of accidental.

I like getting to the core of a problem before writing a single line of code, then building the simplest thing that solves it well — whether that means owning a feature end-to-end alongside a team, or taking a product from idea to launch on my own.

I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science from Antonine University and currently work as a Software Engineer at ITXI, building full-stack web applications with Laravel, WordPress, and React. I'm also pursuing a Master's in AI Engineering, and I like personal projects that blend software engineering with applied machine learning — like training predictive models on real competitive gaming data.
